message:
test(ru-client): add comprehensive unit tests for RU client

33 tests covering version, status, list, sync, sweepPhase1/2/3,
error handling, global options, and JSON extraction from mixed output.

Also adds runner timeout buffer (5s) so CLI can timeout gracefully
before the runner kills the process.

Closes bd-3rpx.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
